test-code.description: same Person created every for-loop iteration -- violation
same Person and same BankTransaction created every iteration -- two violations
same Person created every while-loop iteration -- violation
same Person created every do-while iteration -- violation
Person created outside loop -- no violation
lowercase function call inside loop -- no violation (not a constructor)
BankTransaction uses loop variable amount -- no violation
BankTransaction uses destructured loop variables -- no violation
java.io.File uses loop variable dir -- no violation
constructor arg is a derived loop-body local (1-level) -- no violation
constructor arg method-call on derived local (1-level) -- no violation
anonymous class delegation uses loop var -- no violation
